name: Cura
description: The world's most advanced 3D printer software.

name: FreeCAD
description: An open source parametric 3D CAD modeler.

name: PrusaSlicer
description: A slicer based on Slic3r by Alessandro Ranellucci and the RepRap community.

name: Slic3r
description: Open Source toolpath generator for 3D printers.

name: Ardour
description: Record, Edit, and Mix on Linux.

name: Audacity
description: Free, open source, cross-platform software for recording and editing sounds.

name: Audio Recorder
description: Simple audio recorder available in an Ubuntu PPA.

name: Bitwig
description: DAW for music production.

name: EasyEffects
description: EasyEffects is an advanced audio manipulation tool. It includes an equalizer, limiter, compressor and a reverberation tool, just to mention a few. To complement this there is also a built in spectrum analyzer.

name: Helm
description: A software synthesizer, that runs either standalone, or as an LV2, VST, VST3 or AU plugin.

name: Hydrogen
description: Advanced drum machine for GNU/Linux.

name: KxStudio
description: A collection of applications and plugins for professional audio production.

name: LMMS
description: Making music on your PC by creating melodies and beats, synthesizing and mixing sounds, arranging samples and much more.

name: Mixxx
description: Free DJ software that gives you everything you need to perform live mixes; veritable alternative to Traktor.

name: MuseScore
description: Create, play and print beautiful sheet music.

name: Ocenaudio
description: A cross-platform, easy to use, fast and functional audio editor. It is the ideal software for people who need to edit and analyze audio files.

name: Reaper
description: Audio Production without Limits.

name: VCV Rack
description: An open-source virtual modular synthesizer.

name: Viper4Linux
description: An audio effect processor based on Viper4Android.

name: Amarok
description: Amarok is a free, cross-platform, versatile, powerful and feature-rich music player and collection manager.
